items.title: To be clear, the kind of *work* I do is far from boring and I want people to engage with it bec…
items.content: To be clear, the kind of *work* I do is far from boring and I want people to engage with it because I think it's both difficult and important. The work is definitely top tier in terms of interestingness.
items.summary: To be clear, the kind of *work* I do is far from boring and I want people to engage with it because I think it's both difficult and important. The work is definitely top tier in terms of interestingness.

items.title: It's also weird because why are you even writing about me in the first place? I'm very boring.…
items.content: It's also weird because why are you even writing about me in the first place? I'm very boring. I think I should be the millionth item on people's list of things to write internet fiction about. Somewhere below paper cups and the right way to caulk a bathtub.
items.summary: It's also weird because why are you even writing about me in the first place? I'm very boring. I think I should be the millionth item on people's list of things to write internet fiction about. Somewhere below paper cup…

items.title: I've increasingly seen content written about me that's asserted very confidently but is also co…
items.content: I've increasingly seen content written about me that's asserted very confidently but is also completely made up. We all know it's cheap to bullshit on the internet but it's weird to experience it first hand. Anyway, I just hope internet fiction fools a few but doesn't stick 🤷🏼‍♀️

items.title: What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateur cess…
items.content: What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateur cessna pilot but a lot of fun to be an amateur fighter jet pilot.
items.summary: What I'm learning from flight simulators is that it would be a bit boring to be an amateur cessna pilot but a lot of fun to be an amateur fighter jet pilot.

items.title: It's odd to be living through what feels like one of the most critical periods in human history…
items.content: It's odd to be living through what feels like one of the most critical periods in human history and to feel all of the weight of it from the inside.
items.summary: It's odd to be living through what feels like one of the most critical periods in human history and to feel all of the weight of it from the inside.
